text: Naturalization Study App — An independently built iOS app for the U.S. naturalization test. Features adaptive flashcards, quizzes, progress analytics, multi-language support, Firebase Remote Config for real-time updates, and offline study with sync. Previously published on the Apple App Store; currently unlisted as the Apple Developer account was not renewed. GitHub: https://github.com/patricktran2911/iUSC.

NeuroSpring Hospital Monitoring Platform — A real-time patient-monitoring system for hospitals that detects involuntary movement patterns to enable rapid ambulance deployment. Built with React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Supabase, and integrated MediaPipe with the UNIK AI model for posture and movement analysis. Deployed on web and Raspberry Pi devices.

STEMSight PIM — A medical AI system for real-time detection of 10 classes of Parkinson's involuntary movements. Uses Graph Convolutional Networks (UNIK) trained on skeleton data from MediaPipe. Achieved 82.88% accuracy. Built the full pipeline: data extraction, model training, and FastAPI inference server. GitHub: https://github.com/STEMSight-Project/PIM.

AI Combination Server — A scalable multi-feature AI backend platform with RAG (retrieval-augmented generation). Supports chat, summarization, and suggestion across multiple knowledge contexts. Uses sentence-transformers for semantic retrieval, cross-encoder for reranking, and pluggable LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini). Features SSE streaming for real-time chat. GitHub: https://github.com/patricktran2911/AI-Sources-Project.

FanFly iOS App — Led development of a fan-artist connection platform for show ticket sales. Built the company's first iOS app using modular SwiftUI architecture. Created reusable UI templates that reduced development time by 30% and resolved performance issues that boosted app usage by 40%. The app is still live on the App Store.

Personal Portfolio Website — A responsive portfolio site showcasing projects, skills, and experience. Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS. Hosted on AWS Amplify with automated CI/CD for continuous deployment. Live at https://www.patrickcs-web.com/. GitHub: https://github.com/patricktran2911/patrick-website.
Medical Ocean (Academic Project — Sacramento State): A hospital control and management system built as a team academic project, designed to streamline hospital operations and patient management.
